mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS uuid, google_id, email, nick, profile_img_url, is_admin, last_login, created_at, updated_at, total_games, total_clears, total_abandons, best_record FROM accounts WHERE account_id = #{uuid}

SELECT account_id AS uuid, google_id, email, nick, profile_img_url, is_admin, last_login, created_at, updated_at, total_games, total_clears, total_abandons, best_record FROM accounts WHERE nick = #{nick}

SELECT account_id AS uuid, google_id, email, nick, profile_img_url, is_admin, last_login, created_at, updated_at, total_games, total_clears, total_abandons, best_record FROM accounts WHERE google_id = #{googleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE accounts SET total_games = total_games + 1 WHERE account_id = #{uuid}
UPDATE accounts SET total_clears = total_clears + 1 WHERE account_id = #{uuid}
UPDATE accounts SET total_abandons = total_abandons + 1 WHERE account_id = #{uuid}
UPDATE accounts SET best_record = #{elapsedMs}, updated_at = now() WHERE account_id = #{uuid} AND (best_record IS NULL OR best_record > #{elapsedMs})
